response.overview: This story centers on a husband whose wife is in a coma, while he also cares for their young school-going daughter. It explores the emotional strain and fragile bond within the family, focusing on the husband’s struggle to balance hope, grief, and responsibility. As he navigates life between hospital visits and parenting, the narrative highlights the quiet tragedy and emotional complexity of loving someone who is physically present but unreachable, and the impact it has on their family’s chemistry.m is based on
response.title: Uposongsar
